name: accent_dot_former_latter

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.21 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] #331 `前の` (former) / `後の` (latter) selectors over a `、`-joined clause pair. The run Konkana has two n's; 前の takes the first (dot above → ṅ) and 後の the last (dot below → ṇ) → Koṅkaṇa.

source: Konkana［＃前のnは上ドット付き、後のnは下ドット付き］

expected.serialize: Konkana［＃前のnは上ドット付き、後のnは下ドット付き］
